basic_details.job_title: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority – Chief Engineer – 1 Posts
basic_details.short_information: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Chief Engineer. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 25-05-2026, and closes on 23-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or equivalent in Civil Engineering from a recognized university/Institution, Fifteen years experience in Executive cadre in planning / Construction / Design / Maintenance preferably of Port and Marine structures in an Industrial / Commercial / Government Undertakings

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
